---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- Claude Code version: (e.g. 1.x.x)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- Shell: (e.g. zsh, bash)
- TemplateClaw version: (run `cat ~/.claude/commands/templateclaw.md | head -5`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Paste relevant log output if available.
